findings.location: s2 — 設定ファイル例 XML, BasicSqlStatementExceptionFactory コメント
findings.description: The XML configuration example in the source contains a comment `<!-- Oracleデータベースの場合の一意制約違反のエラーコード -->` indicating that the example values (`duplicateErrorSqlState=""` and `duplicateErrorErrCode="1"`) are Oracle-specific. This context is omitted from the knowledge file. Without it, users may not understand that `1` is Oracle's error code for unique constraint violations and that they need to configure a database-appropriate value.
findings.source_evidence:
<!-- Oracleデータベースの場合の一意制約違反のエラーコード -->
<property name="duplicateErrorSqlState" value=""/>
<property name="duplicateErrorErrCode" value="1"/>

findings.description: The s2 section content references `SqlPStatement` (via `SqlPStatement#setFetchSize` and `SqlPStatement#setQueryTimeout`) and `AppDbConnection` (via `AppDbConnection#prepareStatement`) as PascalCase class names. Neither is listed in the s2 hints array.
findings.source_evidence: SqlPStatement#setFetchSizeを呼び出した場合 / AppDbConnection#prepareStatementを呼び出した場合 (設定内容詳細 fetchSize/queryTimeout notes)
